title: Non-record: Parcae Loop Injection + Gemma-style Attention + Gram NS
author: mikeapedia

data.description: Adds constrained loop injection at recurrence boundaries using learned decay and re-injection of the original residual stream.
Uses partial rotary position embeddings on global attention layers and full RoPE on local layers.
Uses local sliding-window causal attention for non-global layers.
Ties K and V projections on global attention layers to share the same weight matrix.
Uses grouped query attention with a 2:1 query-to-KV head ratio on global layers.
Uses Gram Newton-Schulz on high-aspect-ratio MLP banks, including a restart at step 2 to suppress spurious negative eigenvalues.

novel_contributions: Parcae-inspired constrained loop injection with learned decay and residual re-injection
Evaluation support for extra loop iterations via set_eval_loop_indices()
Gram Newton-Schulz for high-aspect-ratio MLP banks
Reduced Muon backend steps from 5 to 4
Gemma-style global/local attention pattern with partial RoPE on global layers
KV tying on global attention layers
